name: Mortrax, the Rotcrowned
description: The ladder's first rung. A rotting king who opens with telegraphed slams and keeps the pressure on with the dead he raises. Learn the rhythm here, while the fight is still forgiving.

moves.name: Ground Slam
moves.description: Telegraphed fire-ring AoE - step out of the ring before it lands.

moves.name: Risen Dead
moves.description: Raises waves of the dead to swarm the party.

loot.name: Gravecrown, Pitforged
loot.enchants: Prot V, Unb IV, Thorns III
loot.lore: Torn from the skull of Mortrax and quenched in pit-fire. Reforged in the Pit.

loot.name: Gravewalkers, Pitforged
loot.enchants: Prot V, Unb IV, Thorns III
loot.lore: They walked out of the grave once already. Reforged in the Pit.

loot.name: Gravekeeper's Codex, Pitforged
loot.lore: Every burial rite, rewritten as a killing-word. Reforged in the Pit.

loot.name: Gravecrown
loot.enchants: Prot IV, Unb III, Thorns III
loot.lore: Torn from the skull of Mortrax. It still weeps black ichor.

loot.name: Gravewalkers
loot.enchants: Prot IV, Unb III, Thorns III
loot.lore: Caked in the rot of ages.

loot.name: Gravekeeper's Codex
loot.lore: The king's burial rites, bound for a steadier hand.

loot.name: Tombguard Vest
loot.lore: Salvaged from a fallen gravekeeper. The rot never breached it.

loot.name: Mourningblade
loot.lore: It grieves for every shambler it returns to rest.

loot.name: Sexton's Spade
loot.lore: Six feet down, every time. Mortrax buried his own gravediggers.

loot.name: Gravekeeper's Journal
loot.lore: Bound in coffin lining. Chapter one: stay buried.

loot.name: Coffin-Nail Pick
loot.enchants: Eff IV, Fortune II, Unb II
loot.lore: Pries up more than it should.

loot.name: Tomb-Robber's Pick
loot.lore: Crusted with tomb-dirt.

loot.name: Risen Cleaver
loot.lore: Re-gripped by dead hands.

loot.name: Gravewatch Helm
loot.lore: Its last owner kept vigil too long.

loot.name: Shambler's Boots
loot.lore: They keep walking after you stop.

loot.name: Rotten Pages
loot.lore: Handle with gloves.

loot.name: Gravedigger's Hatchet
loot.enchants: Eff II, Sharp II, Unb II
loot.lore: For roots and worse.

loot.name: Pauper's Spade
loot.lore: A grave's a grave.

name: Ossivar, the Pale Sovereign
description: A skeletal monarch who fights at range. The arrow volleys get nastier every phase and stray reinforcements wander in to flank - close the gap or get whittled down.

moves.name: Arrow Volley
moves.description: Ranged volleys that intensify with each HP phase.

moves.name: Reinforcements
moves.description: Stray skeletons wander in to flank the party.

loot.name: Sovereign's Warbow, Pitforged
loot.enchants: Power VI, Punch II, Flame, Unb IV
loot.lore: Strung with the Sovereign's own sinew, drawn in pit-fire. Reforged in the Pit.

loot.name: Bonelord's Aegis, Pitforged
loot.lore: Royal ribs, fused and refusing to break. Reforged in the Pit.

loot.name: Pale Crown, Pitforged
loot.enchants: Prot V, Unb IV, Resp IV
loot.lore: Worn by one who never drew breath, now twice-forged. Reforged in the Pit.

loot.name: Sovereign's Warbow
loot.enchants: Power V, Punch II, Flame, Unb III
loot.lore: Strung with the Sovereign's own sinew.

loot.name: Bonelord's Aegis
loot.lore: Ribs of a king, fused into plate.

loot.name: Pale Crown
loot.enchants: Prot IV, Unb III, Resp III
loot.lore: Worn by one who never drew breath.

loot.name: Court Herald's Warmace
loot.lore: It announces you. Loudly.

loot.name: Splintered Longbow
loot.lore: It creaks like an opening casket.

loot.name: Arrowturn Plate
loot.lore: Angled to shed the Sovereign's volleys. Count the dents. Count the survivals.

loot.name: Volley Drill
loot.lore: Whispers of a thousand archers. Loose as one.

loot.name: Pale Quarry Pick
loot.enchants: Eff IV, Silk Touch, Unb II
loot.lore: Cuts the stone the Court was carved from.

loot.name: Marrowpick
loot.lore: Tipped with a finger-bone.

loot.name: Pale Guard's Greaves
loot.lore: Stripped from a tireless sentry.

loot.name: Courtbow
loot.lore: Standard issue of the Pale Guard.

loot.name: Ossuary Boots
loot.lore: They rattle faintly when you run.

loot.name: Brittle Pages
loot.lore: Dry reading. Very dry.

loot.name: Marrow Cleaver
loot.enchants: Eff II, Sharp II, Unb II
loot.lore: Splits bone and timber alike.

loot.name: Ossuary Spade
loot.lore: The Court is always digging.

name: Vexspinne, the Broodmother
description: Fast, lightly armored, and wrapped in a venom cloud that thickens when she frenzies. Her broods swarm the floor - keep moving and stay out of the poison.

moves.name: Venom
moves.description: A poison cloud clings to her - stronger when frenzied. Don't stand in it.

moves.name: Brood
moves.description: Summons cave-spider broods while she darts in and out.

loot.name: Venomweave, Pitforged
loot.enchants: Prot V, Thorns III, Unb IV
loot.lore: Layered silk over pit-steel. Reforged in the Pit.

loot.name: Chitincrown, Pitforged
loot.enchants: Prot V, Resp III, Unb IV
loot.lore: Carapace hardened past anything that ever molted. Reforged in the Pit.

loot.name: Hive-Hunter's Songbook, Pitforged
loot.lore: The hunting-song, sung back at the hive. Reforged in the Pit.

loot.name: Venomweave
loot.enchants: Prot IV, Thorns III, Unb III
loot.lore: Woven in the dark of the hive.

loot.name: Chitincrown
loot.enchants: Prot IV, Resp III, Unb III
loot.lore: Carved from the Broodmother's carapace.

loot.name: Hive-Hunter's Songbook
loot.lore: Every verse ends with an arrow.

loot.name: Webbed Mail
loot.lore: Bound in layered silk. Stronger than the steel beneath it.

loot.name: Broodbane
loot.enchants: Bane of Arthropods IV, Unb II
loot.lore: Every hive remembers it. Every hive fears it.

loot.name: Silkstep Boots
loot.lore: You land like a whisper on the web. The Broodmother never hears you coming.

loot.name: Molting Notes
loot.lore: Armor lessons from a thousand molts.

loot.name: Silkspinner's Line
loot.enchants: Lure II, Luck of the Sea II, Unb III
loot.lore: Spun strong enough to land anything that bites.

loot.name: Spinneret Pick
loot.lore: Sticky to the touch.

loot.name: Fangblade
loot.lore: Honed from a broodling's fang.

loot.name: Hatchling Helm
loot.lore: Still faintly translucent.

loot.name: Mite-Eaten Mail
loot.lore: The silverfish holes are part of the design.

loot.name: Venomous Pages
loot.lore: The pages itch to read.

loot.name: Webcutter
loot.enchants: Eff III, Sharp II, Unb II
loot.lore: The only edge the web respects.

loot.name: Burrow Spade
loot.lore: Dug the Hollow Hive hollow.

name: Vaelthorn, the Ashbound
description: Wither-skull volleys, heavy slams, and the meanest enrage on the ladder. If your damage isn't there by the final phase, the throne keeps its king.

moves.name: Wither Skulls
moves.description: Volleys of wither skulls raked across the arena.

moves.name: Crushing Slam
moves.description: Heavy melee slams when you're in close.

loot.name: Cindershroud, Pitforged
loot.enchants: Prot V, Fire Prot IV, Unb IV
loot.lore: Forged in the pyre of a dead kingdom, then the Pit. Reforged in the Pit.

loot.name: Ashen Crown, Pitforged
loot.enchants: Prot V, Unb IV, Thorns III
loot.lore: Bound in nether-ash and pit-fire both. Reforged in the Pit.

loot.name: Ashbound Chronicle, Pitforged
loot.enchants: Fire Prot IV, Mending, Prot IV
loot.lore: The fall of the kingdom, retold by firelight. Reforged in the Pit.

loot.name: Cindershroud
loot.enchants: Prot IV, Fire Prot IV, Unb III
loot.lore: Forged in the pyre of a dead kingdom. The ash never cools.

loot.name: Ashen Crown
loot.enchants: Prot IV, Unb III, Thorns III
loot.lore: Bound in nether-ash and royal grief.

loot.name: Ashbound Chronicle
loot.lore: Written in a hand that would not burn.

loot.name: Thronebreaker Pick
loot.enchants: Eff V, Fortune III, Unb III
loot.lore: It took the throne apart one block at a time.

loot.name: Emberpick
loot.lore: Still warm to the touch. It has never once gone out.

loot.name: Charblade
loot.enchants: Fire Aspect II, Sharp II, Unb II
loot.lore: It cauterizes as it cuts. Vaelthorn's smiths wasted nothing.

loot.name: Cinderwalk Boots
loot.enchants: Soul Speed II, Fire Prot II, Unb II
loot.lore: The ash parts before them. Made for the roads of a burning kingdom.

loot.name: Pyre Notes
loot.lore: Reads best by firelight. Preferably someone else's.

loot.name: Ashfeller
loot.enchants: Eff IV, Sharp III, Unb II
loot.lore: Felled the orchards of the Ashbound, then their soldiers.

loot.name: Scorched Plate
loot.lore: Half-melted, still serviceable.

loot.name: Ashwalker Boots
loot.lore: They leave no prints in the cinders.

loot.name: Bonechar Pick
loot.lore: Hafted with wither-bone.

loot.name: Throneguard Helm
loot.lore: Dented by a falling crown.

loot.name: Singed Pages
loot.lore: Edges singed black.

loot.name: Cinder Spade
loot.lore: Built for shoveling a kingdom's worth of ash.

name: Maelgrave, the Grand Augur
description: The top of the ladder. Marches lines of evoker fangs across the floor and fights behind a vindicator-and-vex warband. Sidestep the fangs, cut the warband, then deal with the Augur.

moves.name: Fangs
moves.description: A marching line of evoker fangs toward a player - sidestep the line.

loot.name: Totembound Aegis, Pitforged
loot.lore: Inlaid with totems that shattered and were remade. Reforged in the Pit.

loot.name: Augur's Sigil, Pitforged
loot.lore: The Conclave's final rite, stolen twice over. Reforged in the Pit.

loot.name: Conclave Verdict, Pitforged
loot.lore: The sentence, carried out faster. Reforged in the Pit.

loot.name: Totembound Aegis
loot.lore: Inlaid with shattered totems.

loot.name: Augur's Sigil
loot.lore: The Conclave's final rite, stolen.

loot.name: Conclave Verdict
loot.lore: The Grand Conclave never acquits.

loot.name: Outrider's Spear
loot.lore: Favored by the warband's fastest riders.

loot.name: Ravagerhide Vest
loot.lore: Tanned from a beast that wouldn't kneel. Maelgrave rode its brother in.

loot.name: Omenblade
loot.lore: It read your fate in the swing. The omen is always the same.

loot.name: Sharp Omens
loot.lore: The margins scream.

loot.name: Raider's Pick
loot.enchants: Eff IV, Fortune II, Unb II
loot.lore: What the warband can't steal, it mines.

loot.name: Conclave Crossbow
loot.lore: Standard issue of the warband.

loot.name: Vindicator's Axe
loot.lore: Notched from a hundred raids.

loot.name: Augur's Robes
loot.lore: Iron plates under grey cloth.

loot.name: Banner-Bearer's Cap
loot.lore: The banner did not survive.

loot.name: Multishot Manual
loot.lore: Three bolts where one would do.

loot.name: Trench Spade
loot.lore: The Conclave digs in before it raids out.

name: Korrin Brakkus, the Undefeated
description: Not on the ladder - a one-on-one gladiator duel. He lunges across the pit and slams on landing, and once you've bloodied him he calls in two 'seconds' to even the odds.

moves.name: Leap
moves.description: Lunges across the pit and slams on landing - heed the ⚠ INCOMING warning.

moves.name: Seconds
moves.description: Brings in two 'seconds' once he's bloodied.

loot.name: Champion's Pike, Pitforged
loot.enchants: Sharp VI, Knockback III, Unb IV
loot.lore: The reach that ended every challenge, lengthened. Reforged in the Pit.

loot.name: Victor's Plate, Pitforged
loot.enchants: Prot V, Thorns III, Unb IV
loot.lore: Dented by every challenger, mended by the Pit. Reforged in the Pit.

loot.name: Champion's Laurel, Pitforged
loot.enchants: Prot V, Resp III, Unb IV
loot.lore: Worn by the one who finally fell, and rose pit-forged. Reforged in the Pit.

loot.name: Champion's Pike
loot.enchants: Sharp V, Knockback II, Unb III
loot.lore: Korrin's reach. Nobody got past it.

loot.name: Victor's Plate
loot.enchants: Prot IV, Thorns III, Unb III
loot.lore: Dented by every challenger before you.

loot.name: Champion's Laurel
loot.enchants: Prot IV, Resp III, Unb III
loot.lore: Worn by the one who finally fell.

loot.name: Korrin's Technique
loot.lore: The champion's footwork, dictated between bouts.

loot.name: Challenger's Blade
loot.enchants: Sharp III, Sweeping Edge II, Unb II
loot.lore: Issued to every name on the roster. Most are returned unused.

loot.name: Crowd-Splitter
loot.enchants: Knockback II, Sharp II, Unb II
loot.lore: Send them into the stands. The crowd will throw them back.

loot.name: Veteran's Warplate
loot.lore: One hundred bouts, one owner. Then one bad day.

loot.name: Footwork Drills
loot.lore: Step. Pivot. Live. Korrin wrote the last chapter mid-leap.

loot.name: Arena-Builder's Axe
loot.enchants: Eff IV, Sharp III, Unb II
loot.lore: The arena went up faster than any challenger went down.

loot.name: Arena Buckler
loot.lore: Scarred but unbroken.

loot.name: Gladiator's Greaves
loot.lore: Sand still in the joints.

loot.name: Sparring Sword
loot.lore: Dulled by a thousand drills.

loot.name: Pitwalker Boots
loot.lore: The sand remembers every fall.

loot.name: Training Regimen
loot.lore: A champion's training regimen.

loot.name: Pit-Hand's Axe
loot.enchants: Eff II, Sharp II, Unb II
loot.lore: For the work between bouts.

loot.name: Sandgroom's Shovel
loot.lore: The pit must be raked between deaths.
